description: Curated, vetted-before-extraction list of authoritative sources for Huế culture. Every knowledge chunk seeded into Qdrant must trace back to one source_id here. Books are tagged source_type=book and their claims must be marked separately in chunk metadata. review_status must be moved to 'approved' by a human before extraction.

sources.publisher: Trung tâm Bảo tồn Di tích Cố đô Huế (Hue Monuments Conservation Centre)
covers: thơ văn trên kiến trúc cung đình Huế
lễ nghi / di tích triều Nguyễn
sources.authority_note: Primary state authority managing the Complex of Hué Monuments; most reliable for monument facts, dates, and architecture.
sources.license_note: Government portal — cite publisher + page; confirm reuse terms before quoting long passages.

sources.publisher: Cục Du lịch Quốc gia Việt Nam (Vietnam National Authority of Tourism)
sources.authority_note: National tourism authority; good for overview, cuisine, and festival framing.

sources.publisher: Sở Du lịch thành phố Huế (Hue Department of Tourism)
covers: văn hóa / lễ hội / ẩm thực địa phương
sources.authority_note: Official local tourism gateway (vi/en/ja). Department site also at sdl.hue.gov.vn.

sources.publisher: Cổng thông tin điện tử thành phố Huế
covers: thông tin hành chính / địa phương
tổ chức quản lý di tích
sự kiện văn hóa thành phố Huế
sources.authority_note: City portal. Huế became a centrally-governed city in 2025; this replaces the former thuathienhue.gov.vn provincial portal for the new administration.

sources.publisher: Trung tâm Lưu trữ quốc gia (National Archives of Vietnam)
covers: tư liệu lịch sử triều Nguyễn
sources.authority_note: Custodian of Châu bản triều Nguyễn (UNESCO Memory of the World, international register 2017; Asia-Pacific 2014).
sources.license_note: Government archive — cite publisher + document; archival images may have separate reuse terms.

covers: Imperial City / Forbidden Purple City / Perfume River setting
sources.authority_note: Canonical World Heritage listing (ref. 678). Authoritative for inscription year, criteria, and OUV wording.
sources.license_note: © UNESCO — short factual citation with attribution; do not reproduce full descriptions verbatim.

covers: ceremonial / ritual musical tradition of the Nguyễn court
sources.authority_note: Canonical ICH element (00074). Authoritative for inscription dates and description of Nhã nhạc.
sources.license_note: © UNESCO — short factual citation with attribution.

sources.publisher: UNESCO Memory of the World Programme
covers: Thơ văn trên kiến trúc cung đình Huế (Asia-Pacific MoW, 2016)
sources.authority_note: Memory of the World programme home. Exact per-element MoW record URLs still need to be pinned during review.
sources.license_note: © UNESCO — short factual citation with attribution.

sources.publisher: Trần Ngọc Thêm — "Cơ sở văn hóa Việt Nam"
covers: khung lý thuyết văn hóa Việt Nam
vùng văn hóa, không gian văn hóa
bối cảnh văn hóa miền Trung / Huế (gián tiếp)
sources.authority_note: Already in repo (data/books/). Foundational cultural-studies text; supports framing, not place-specific monument facts. Book claims must be marked source_type=book in chunk metadata.
sources.license_note: Copyrighted book — internal grounding only; do not redistribute the PDF; quote sparingly with page_or_section.

sources.publisher: Phan Thuận An — "Kiến trúc Cố đô Huế"
covers: kiến trúc Kinh thành / Hoàng thành Huế
bố cục cung điện, lăng tẩm
sources.authority_note: Recommended scholarly reference for Huế architecture. Not yet acquired — team to confirm edition and obtain.
sources.license_note: Copyrighted book — acquire before use; mark source_type=book.

sources.publisher: Quốc sử quán triều Nguyễn — "Đại Nam nhất thống chí"
covers: mô tả Kinh thành Huế, di tích, phong tục đương thời
sources.authority_note: Primary historical gazetteer compiled by the Nguyễn court. Use a reputable modern translation/edition; mark as book.
sources.license_note: Public-domain original text; specific translations may be copyrighted — record the edition in page_or_section.
